TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Alexander Lukashenko == ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 8, Alexander Lukashenko, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Belarus ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander Lukashenko, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 1994 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Alexander Lukashenko mqwas biru sa Alexandria pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. Alexander Lukashenko, kawas tay 1975 tmasuq mqwas biru sa Mogilev Pedagogical pqwsan biru krahu (Mogilev State A. Kuleshov pqwsan biru krahu). qnxan nya Alexander Lukashenko maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Galina Zhelnerovich, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Alexander Lukashenko hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 1994, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru
S.PHON: == alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βelarus~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa alexan*ria pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko, kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa moɣile* pe*aɣoɣiʦ~ʨal pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu (moɣile* s~ɕtate a. kules~ɕħo* pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu). qnxan nja alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ɣalina zħelnero*iʦ~ʨħ, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. mintzjuwaw nja alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiru
S.FORM: == Alexander Lukashenko == ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 8, Alexander Lukashenko, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Belarus ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander Lukashenko, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 1994 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Alexander Lukashenko mqwas biru sa Alexandria pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. Alexander Lukashenko, kawas tay 1975 tmasuq mqwas biru sa Mogilev Pedagogical pqwsan biru krahu (Mogilev State A. Kuleshov pqwsan biru krahu). qnxan nya Alexander Lukashenko maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Galina Zhelnerovich, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Alexander Lukashenko hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 1994, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru
S.PHON: == alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βelarus~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa alexan*ria pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko, kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa moɣile* pe*aɣoɣiʦ~ʨal pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu (moɣile* s~ɕtate a. kules~ɕħo* pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu). qnxan nja alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ɣalina zħelnero*iʦ~ʨħ, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. mintzjuwaw nja alexan*er lukas~ɕħenko ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiru
